mapper.select: SELECT sub.date, sub.code, sub.close, sub.changeAmount, sub.changeRate, sub.lastUpdate FROM ( SELECT date, code, close, change_amount AS changeAmount, change_rate AS changeRate, last_update AS lastUpdate FROM daily_price_exchange WHERE code = #{code} ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 365 ) AS sub ORDER BY sub.date ASC
SELECT close FROM daily_price_exchange WHERE code = #{code} ORDER BY last_update DESC LIMIT 1
